name: sena-lms
description: LMS del SENA - Técnico en Programación de Software

scripts.instalar: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently -n servidor,cliente -c green,blue "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.build:produccion: npm install --prefix server --include=dev && npm install --prefix client --include=dev && npm run build --prefix client && npm run generar:pg --prefix server
